offer: For fleet maintenance supervisors managing 5–15 vehicles, inconsistent scheduling causes unexpected vehicle downtime. We provide a scheduling tool instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or paper logs.
problem: Inconsistent scheduling of preventative maintenance tasks leads to unexpected vehicle downtime.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for fleet maintenance supervisors
Indie Hackers discussions on scheduling tools
DM outreach to fleet maintenance supervisors with demo video
Community forums for fleet maintenance supervisors sharing solutions
try_it: Let users test scheduling tool on 1-3 vehicles
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with clear CTA
Produce a demo video of the scheduling tool
Offer early access to first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save frequently used inputs as templates
Allow CSV import for existing maintenance data
Simplify onboarding process for new users
